name: n8n-scheduler-wake
description: EventBridge-triggered orchestrator for the KB-freshness scanner. Wakes the n8n EC2, gates biweekly via ISO-week parity, then dispatches the scanner via SSM RunCommand. Replaces the planned n8n Schedule + ExecuteCommand workflow because n8n does not register the executeCommand node at runtime in 2.14.x or 2.17.x.

scripts.deploy: aws lambda update-function-code --function-name n8n-scheduler-wake --zip-file fileb://deployment.zip --profile chris-admin
